LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT VANESSA MAITA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S ATTEMPT TO SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WAS INVALID BECAUSE 574 HICKORY WAS NOT DEFENDANT'S HOME. THEREFORE, THE COURT DID NOT ACQUIRE JURISDICTION OVER DEFENDANT AND THE JUDGMENT AGAINST HER IS VOID. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT VANESSA MAITA'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S ATTEMPT TO SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WAS INVALID BECAUSE 574 HICKORY WAS NOT DEFENDANT'S HOME. THEREFORE, THE COURT DID NOT ACQUIRE JURISDICTION OVER DEFENDANT AND THE JUDGMENT AGAINST HER IS VOID. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB/ER)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: February 21, 2007

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Dean Christopherson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Franklin Capital Corporation.
No appearance by defendant Vanessa Maita.
Default entered against defendant on January 3, 2008.
Order for leave to proceed by declaration in lieu of witness testimony filed January 18, 2008.
Does dismissed on February 8, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Franklin Capital Corporation and against the Defaulted Defendant Vanessa Maita as follows:

Damages/Principal $42,698.44.
Prejudgment Interest $4,787.70.
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00.
Costs $443.06, for a total of $50,754.20.

Additionally, plaintiff Franklin Capital Corporation shall recover from defendant Vanessa Maita possession of the 2006 Chevrolet Silverado 2500 bearing Vehicle Identification Number ICGHK23U46F149802. Defendant Vanessa Maita shall delivery said vehicle within ten days of service of this judgment on her. Failure to comply may result result in a contempt action against defendant Vanesa Maita.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Continued To Feb-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
